verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Dear Lord, I can't do nothing without you And I can't do nothing for you, Everything I give to you, you give it back to me What shall I render for all of your love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord You've been my friend, you supply my every need, What shall I render for all of you love, When I am sick you take away my pain, What shall I render for all of your love, All I need to do is pray and call your name, What shall I render for all of your love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I am lonely You're with me all the way What shall I render for all of your love When I was lost in sin you died on Calvary What shall I render for all of you love The reason why you died it was to set me free What shall I render for all of your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Dear Lord I can't do nothing without you And I can't do nothing for you Everything I give to you, you give it back to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What shall I render What shall I render What shall I render (the earth is the Lord's) What shall I render (and the fullness thereof) What shall I render (He owns the cows) What shall I render (On a thousand hills) What shall I render (He made the land) What shall I render (He made the sea) What shall I render (I'm so glad) What shall I render (God made me) What shall I render (What shall I render) What shall I render (What shall I render What shall I render for all of your love.
